heading: Principal office
label: 90106 Principal office
text: The principal office of the foundation shall be in the District of Columbia unless the board of directors determines otherwise. However, the foundation may conduct business throughout the States, territories, and possessions of the United States.
notes: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152606 of this title
amendments: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152606 of this title
